generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring cart motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring hoist motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorControllerCart : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorControllerHoist : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor control and data acquisition"
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp"
    base:contains CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, TMC4671EvalMotorControllerCart, TMC4671EvalMotorControllerHoist, Arduino
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorPositionSensor
]

instance HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorPositionSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle data from hoist swing motion sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, EclipseMosquittoEnabler, GantrylibModuleEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed data from anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, EclipseMosquittoEnabler, GantrylibModuleEnabler
]

instance CartMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cart motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, EclipseMosquittoEnabler, GantrylibModuleEnabler
]

instance HoistMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Hoist motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, EclipseMosquittoEnabler, GantrylibModuleEnabler
]

instance AutodeskFusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created with Autodesk Fusion360 for lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibModuleEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of crane for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibModuleEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics and controllers for trajectory testing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibModuleEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaMBSEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia-based Model-Based Systems Engineering model for crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4ModelEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization platform for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for crane state data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization tool for real-time crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GantrylibModuleEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneSimulationService
]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionModelingService
]

instance ArduinoIDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino IDE for microcontroller programming"
    DTDFVocab:enables MicrocontrollerProgrammingService
]

instance HMIEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Human-Machine Interface for operator configuration and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables OperatorConfigurationService, ManualControlService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models to produce residual-swing-free paths"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalPathInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging using TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAvailabilityInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing measured vs. simulated trajectories with threshold-based alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Crane simulation modeling physical dynamics for trajectory testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance SystemEvolutionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System evolution modeling using DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemEvolutionModelInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection via time-series classification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance MicrocontrollerProgrammingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for programming Arduino microcontroller"
    DTDFVocab:provides MicrocontrollerProgrammingResultInsight
]

instance OperatorConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for operator configuration of logging parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigureLoggingParametersAction
]

instance ManualControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for manual crane control"
    DTDFVocab:provides ManualControlAction
]

instance FaultAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault alerts generated when trajectory deviations exceed thresholds"
]

instance OptimalPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal movement paths for reduced swing"
]

instance HistoricalDataAvailabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Availability of historical data for analysis"
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operational data"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for trajectory testing"
]

instance SystemEvolutionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System evolution model for digital twin development"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection insights from time-series classification"
]

instance MicrocontrollerProgrammingResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of Arduino microcontroller programming"
]

instance ConfigureLoggingParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator configuration of logging parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ManualControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual control of crane"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends trajectory commands and control signals to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates them into motor controller instructions (via TMC4671-Eval controllers) for precise movement of the cart and hoist. The Trajectory Generator Service generates optimal movement paths that are executed through this interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data logging and validation. The Continuous Validation Service processes measurements and simulations at a frequency sufficient for immediate fault detection, while the Logging Application streams crane state data without specified fixed intervals, ensuring near-instantaneous updates for operational monitoring."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized system orchestrated via C4 Model architecture: Physical Crane (hardware), Physical Crane Interface (Python connector), Control Application, Logging Application, Human Machine Interface (HMI), and digital twin services (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT Broker). Components interact through MQTT messaging and Python modules, deployed on a single personal computer with Docker containers for key services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (via CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360 and Arcadia MBSE models) and 'as operated' (real-time sensor data logging and control during crane operation). The digital twin integrates design-phase models with operational data for comprehensive lifecycle representation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares measured trajectory execution data with simulated trajectories using distance metrics (e.g., RMSE), with thresholds triggering operator alerts. Model validation techniques from prior publications ([5]) are reused to ensure simulation fidelity, with discrepancies indicating potential faults or model inaccuracies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto broker for inter-service communication. The Physical Crane Interface uses Python to interface with Arduino and motor controllers, transmitting sensor data and receiving control commands over a local network with minimal latency."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a single personal computer. Database, MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard run in Docker containers managed by a single docker-compose file. Python modules (gantrylib) execute natively on the host OS, with Arduino code deployed directly to the microcontroller hardware."
]
